name: Omar Aglan
title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
summary: Full-Stack Software Engineer with strong backend experience building production web applications using Node.js (Express and NestJS), React and Next.js, and ASP.NET Core. Skilled in designing scalable REST APIs, integrating SQL and NoSQL databases, implementing JWT or OAuth2 authentication, and automating delivery with Docker + CI-CD (GitHub Actions). Additional experience in C/C++ and Unity (C#) for game development and performance-focused programming.

responsibilities: Designed backend services and REST APIs; implemented authentication/authorization and database integrations.
Set up containerized environments using Docker and automated build/test/release pipelines.
Established engineering practices: task breakdown, estimation, code review workflows, and release coordination.
Tech: Node.js, ExpressJS and NestJS, React, TypeScript, Docker, GitHub Actions, SQL and NoSQL
Developed full-stack web applications using React and Next.js frontends and Node.js backends.
Built secure authentication and authorization flows; delivered APIs integrated with SQL Server and MongoDB.
Participated in feature planning, implementation, and deployment across staging and production environments.
Tech: React, Next.js, Node.js, ASP.NET Core, SQL Server, MongoDB
Delivered custom web solutions using React and Vue frontends and Node.js backends based on client requirements.
Migrated and modernized legacy codebases, improving maintainability via improved structure and reusable components.
Collaborated with international clients across time zones to scope requirements, estimate work, and deliver milestones.
Tech: React, Vue.js, Node.js, Express, Docker, GitHub Actions

educations.institution: Higher Institute of MIS, Kafr El-Sheikh
